overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a dirt trail through an open prairie with snow-capped mountains in the distance. A horse-drawn cart passes by midway through the clip, and a lake becomes visible on the left horizon as the character continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with distant snow-capped mountain range

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall prairie grass with mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks with snow visible on summits under partly cloudy skies
worn dirt path with visible wheel ruts running through the grassland
tall yellow-green grass covering the prairie landscape
tall yellow-green grass covering the prairie landscape
low green shrubs and scrub vegetation scattered across the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an expansive prairie landscape. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distant center while tall grass and scattered bushes fill the foreground. The sky is partly cloudy with bright natural lighting.

events.description: horse-drawn cart with driver passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse-drawn cart overtakes on the right side

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn cart traveling in the same direction, overtaking the character on the right side of the path

entered.detail: wooden cart with large spoked wheels pulled by a horse, carrying a driver in period clothing

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn cart enters from the right and passes by, traveling in the same direction along the trail. The cart moves ahead and begins to distance itself while the prairie landscape continues.

events.description: lake becomes visible on the left horizon as the landscape opens up

agents.ego_description: walking along the trail with the cart now far ahead and a lake visible in the valley to the left

entered.detail: body of water visible in the valley to the left, reflecting the sky

segments.scene_description: The cart moves far ahead and fades into the distance. A lake becomes visible on the left horizon in the valley below, while the character continues along the dirt trail through the prairie with the mountain range still prominent ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through an expansive prairie that gradually reveals a distant valley lake. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and scattered bushes under a partly cloudy sky, with snow-capped mountains looming in the far distance. As the journey continues, a horse-drawn cart enters from the right and passes by, moving ahead along the path until it begins to distance itself. The scene then opens further as the cart fades into the horizon, uncovering a shimmering lake in the valley to the left. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum through the prairie, keeping the prominent mountain range centered as the landscape expands.
